record.field: Appwrite is an open-source, all-in-one backend platform that lets you build secure web, mobile, and AI apps without stitching together infrastructure.

Appwrite is an open-source, all-in-one backend platform that lets you build secure web, mobile, and AI apps without stitching together infrastructure.

It bundles the backend primitives most apps need—authentication, databases, storage, serverless functions, messaging, realtime, and integrated web hosting—behind REST, GraphQL, and WebSocket APIs. Packaged as Docker microservices, it self-hosts with a single command and is a fully open, data-sovereign alternative to proprietary BaaS offerings like Firebase. It targets solo developers and teams who want production-ready backends fast while keeping full control over their infrastructure.

Key features
  • Authentication with email/password, SMS, OAuth, magic links, and anonymous sessions
  • Document database (backed by MariaDB) with querying, pagination, and indexing
  • File storage with encryption and on-the-fly image transformation
  • Serverless Functions supporting 15+ language runtimes
  • Multi-channel messaging (email, SMS, push) and realtime subscriptions
  • Sites: integrated web hosting for static and SSR frameworks with custom domains and Git deploys
Best for

Developers and teams building full-stack web, mobile, or AI applications who want a self-hosted, open-source backend with strong developer experience and full data ownership. Ideal for replacing fragmented backend stacks or a self-hostable Firebase alternative.

field.name: tag_ids
field.eval: [Command.set([ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_self_hosted'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_dev_tools'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_paas'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_database'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_storage'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_identity'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_security'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_automation')])]

record.field:
services: appwrite: logging: &id001 driver: json-file options: max-file: '5' max-size: 10m image: appwrite/appwrite:1.8.0 restart: unless-stopped labels: - traefik.enable=true - traefik.constraint-label-stack=appwrite volumes: - ./appwrite_uploads:/storage/uploads - ./appwrite_imports:/storage/imports - ./appwrite_cache:/storage/cache - ./appwrite_config:/storage/config - ./appwrite_certificates:/storage/certificates - ./appwrite_functions:/storage/functions - ./appwrite_sites:/storage/sites - ./appwrite_builds:/storage/builds depends_on: - mariadb - redis environment: - _APP_ENV - _APP_WORKER_PER_CORE - _APP_LOCALE - _APP_COMPRESSION_MIN_SIZE_BYTES - _APP_CONSOLE_WHITELIST_ROOT - _APP_CONSOLE_WHITELIST_EMAILS - _APP_CONSOLE_SESSION_ALERTS - _APP_CONSOLE_WHITELIST_IPS - _APP_CONSOLE_HOSTNAMES - _APP_SYSTEM_EMAIL_NAME - _APP_SYSTEM_EMAIL_ADDRESS - _APP_EMAIL_SECURITY - _APP_SYSTEM_RESPONSE_FORMAT - _APP_OPTIONS_ABUSE - _APP_OPTIONS_ROUTER_PROTECTION - _APP_OPTIONS_FORCE_HTTPS - _APP_OPTIONS_ROUTER_FORCE_HTTPS - _APP_OPENSSL_KEY_V1 - _APP_DOMAIN - _APP_DOMAIN_TARGET_CNAME - _APP_DOMAIN_TARGET_AAAA - _APP_DOMAIN_TARGET_A - _APP_DOMAIN_TARGET_CAA - _APP_DNS - _APP_DOMAIN_FUNCTIONS - _APP_REDIS_HOST - _APP_REDIS_PORT - _APP_REDIS_USER - _APP_REDIS_PASS - _APP_DB_HOST - _APP_DB_PORT - _APP_DB_SCHEMA - _APP_DB_USER - _APP_DB_PASS - _APP_SMTP_HOST - _APP_SMTP_PORT - _APP_SMTP_SECURE - _APP_SMTP_USERNAME - _APP_SMTP_PASSWORD - _APP_USAGE_STATS - _APP_STORAGE_LIMIT - _APP_STORAGE_PREVIEW_LIMIT - _APP_STORAGE_ANTIVIRUS - _APP_STORAGE_ANTIVIRUS_HOST - _APP_STORAGE_ANTIVIRUS_PORT - _APP_STORAGE_DEVICE - _APP_STORAGE_S3_ACCESS_KEY - _APP_STORAGE_S3_SECRET - _APP_STORAGE_S3_REGION - _APP_STORAGE_S3_BUCKET - _APP_STORAGE_S3_ENDPOINT - _APP_STORAGE_DO_SPACES_ACCESS_KEY - _APP_STORAGE_DO_SPACES_SECRET - _APP_STORAGE_DO_SPACES_REGION - _APP_STORAGE_DO_SPACES_BUCKET - _APP_STORAGE_BACKBLAZE_ACCESS_KEY - _APP_STORAGE_BACKBLAZE_SECRET - _APP_STORAGE_BACKBLAZE_REGION - _APP_STORAGE_BACKBLAZE_BUCKET - _APP_STORAGE_LINODE_ACCESS_KEY - _APP_STORAGE_LINODE_SECRET - _APP_STORAGE_LINODE_REGION - _APP_STORAGE_LINODE_BUCKET - _APP_STORAGE_WASABI_ACCESS_KEY - _APP_STORAGE_WASABI_SECRET - _APP_STORAGE_WASABI_REGION - _APP_STORAGE_WASABI_BUCKET - _APP_COMPUTE_SIZE_LIMIT - _APP_FUNCTIONS_TIMEOUT - _APP_SITES_TIMEOUT - _APP_COMPUTE_BUILD_TIMEOUT - _APP_COMPUTE_CPUS - _APP_COMPUTE_MEMORY - _APP_FUNCTIONS_RUNTIMES - _APP_SITES_RUNTIMES - _APP_DOMAIN_SITES - _APP_EXECUTOR_SECRET={{ app_executor_secret }} - _APP_EXECUTOR_HOST - _APP_LOGGING_CONFIG - _APP_MAINTENANCE_INTERVAL - _APP_MAINTENANCE_DELAY - _APP_MAINTENANCE_START_TIME - _APP_MAINTENANCE_RETENTION_EXECUTION - _APP_MAINTENANCE_RETENTION_CACHE - _APP_MAINTENANCE_RETENTION_ABUSE - _APP_MAINTENANCE_RETENTION_AUDIT - _APP_MAINTENANCE_RETENTION_AUDIT_CONSOLE - _APP_MAINTENANCE_RETENTION_USAGE_HOURLY - _APP_MAINTENANCE_RETENTION_SCHEDULES - _APP_SMS_PROVIDER - _APP_SMS_FROM - _APP_GRAPHQL_MAX_BATCH_SIZE - _APP_GRAPHQL_MAX_COMPLEXITY - _APP_GRAPHQL_MAX_DEPTH - _APP_VCS_GITHUB_APP_NAME - _APP_VCS_GITHUB_PRIVATE_KEY - _APP_VCS_GITHUB_APP_ID - _APP_VCS_GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET - _APP_VCS_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET - _APP_VCS_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID - _APP_MIGRATIONS_FIREBASE_CLIENT_ID - _APP_MIGRATIONS_FIREBASE_CLIENT_SECRET - _APP_ASSISTANT_OPENAI_API_KEY container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}' ports: - '{{ PORT_HTTP }}:80' networks: - internal - agz-proxy-network appwrite-console: logging: *id001 image: appwrite/console:7.4.7 restart: unless-stopped labels: - traefik.enable=true - traefik.constraint-label-stack=appwrite container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_appwrite_console' networks: - internal appwrite-realtime: logging: *id001 image: appwrite/appwrite:1.8.0 entrypoint: realtime restart: unless-stopped labels: - traefik.enable=true - traefik.constraint-label-stack=appwrite depends_on: - mariadb - redis environment: - _APP_ENV - _APP_WORKER_PER_CORE - _APP_OPTIONS_ABUSE - _APP_OPTIONS_ROUTER_PROTECTION - _APP_OPENSSL_KEY_V1 - _APP_REDIS_HOST - _APP_REDIS_PORT - _APP_REDIS_USER - _APP_REDIS_PASS - _APP_DB_HOST - _APP_DB_PORT - _APP_DB_SCHEMA - _APP_DB_USER - _APP_DB_PASS - _APP_USAGE_STATS - _APP_LOGGING_CONFIG container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_appwrite_realtime' networks: - internal appwrite-worker-audits: logging: *id001 image: appwrite/appwrite:1.8.0 entrypoint: worker-audits restart: unless-stopped depends_on: - redis - mariadb environment: - _APP_ENV - _APP_WORKER_PER_CORE - _APP_OPENSSL_KEY_V1 - _APP_REDIS_HOST - _APP_REDIS_PORT - _APP_REDIS_USER - _APP_REDIS_PASS - _APP_DB_HOST - _APP_DB_PORT - _APP_DB_SCHEMA - _APP_DB_USER - _APP_DB_PASS - _APP_LOGGING_CONFIG container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_appwrite_worker_audits' networks: - internal appwrite-worker-webhooks: logging: *id001 image: appwrite/appwrite:1.8.0 entrypoint: worker-webhooks restart: unless-stopped depends_on: - redis - mariadb environment: - _APP_ENV - _APP_WORKER_PER_CORE - _APP_OPENSSL_KEY_V1 - _APP_EMAIL_SECURITY - _APP_SYSTEM_SECURITY_EMAIL_ADDRESS - _APP_DB_HOST - _APP_DB_PORT - _APP_DB_SCHEMA - _APP_DB_USER - _APP_DB_PASS - _APP_REDIS_HOST - _APP_REDIS_PORT - _APP_REDIS_USER - _APP_REDIS_PASS - _APP_LOGGING_CONFIG container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_appwrite_worker_webhooks' networks: - internal appwrite-worker-deletes: logging: *id001 image: appwrite/appwrite:1.8.0 entrypoint: worker-deletes restart: unless-stopped depends_on: - redis - mariadb volumes: - ./appwrite_uploads:/storage/uploads - ./appwrite_cache:/storage/cache - ./appwrite_functions:/storage/functions - ./appwrite_sites:/storage/sites - ./appwrite_builds:/storage/builds - ./appwrite_certificates:/storage/certificates environment: - _APP_ENV - _APP_WORKER_PER_CORE - _APP_OPENSSL_KEY_V1 - _APP_REDIS_HOST - _APP_REDIS_PORT - _APP_REDIS_USER - _APP_REDIS_PASS - _APP_DB_HOST - _APP_DB_PORT - _APP_DB_SCHEMA - _APP_DB_USER - _APP_DB_PASS - _APP_STORAGE_DEVICE - _APP_STORAGE_S3_ACCESS_KEY - _APP_STORAGE_S3_SECRET - _APP_STORAGE_S3_REGION - _APP_STORAGE_S3_BUCKET - _APP_STORAGE_S3_ENDPOINT - _APP_STORAGE_DO_SPACES_ACCESS_KEY - _APP_STORAGE_DO_SPACES_SECRET - _APP_STORAGE_DO_SPACES_REGION - _APP_STORAGE_DO_SPACES_BUCKET - _APP_STORAGE_BACKBLAZE_ACCESS_KEY - _APP_STORAGE_BACKBLAZE_SECRET - _APP_STORAGE_BACKBLAZE_REGION - _APP_STORAGE_BACKBLAZE_BUCKET - _APP_STORAGE_LINODE_ACCESS_KEY - _APP_STORAGE_LINODE_SECRET - _APP_STORAGE_LINODE_REGION - _APP_STORAGE_LINODE_BUCKET - _APP_STORAGE_WASABI_ACCESS_KEY - _APP_STORAGE_WASABI_SECRET - _APP_STORAGE_WASABI_REGION - _APP_STORAGE_WASABI_BUCKET - _APP_LOGGING_CONFIG - _APP_EXECUTOR_SECRET={{ app_executor_secret }} - _APP_EXECUTOR_HOST - _APP_MAINTENANCE_RETENTION_ABUSE - _APP_MAINTENANCE_RETENTION_AUDIT - _APP_MAINTENANCE_RETENTION_AUDIT_CONSOLE - _APP_MAINTENANCE_RETENTION_EXECUTION - _APP_SYSTEM_SECURITY_EMAIL_ADDRESS - _APP_EMAIL_CERTIFICATES container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_appwrite_worker_deletes' networks: - internal appwrite-worker-databases: logging: *id001 image: appwrite/appwrite:1.8.0 entrypoint: worker-databases restart: unless-stopped depends_on: - redis - mariadb environment: - _APP_ENV - _APP_WORKER_PER_CORE - _APP_OPENSSL_KEY_V1 - _APP_REDIS_HOST - _APP_REDIS_PORT - _APP_REDIS_USER - _APP_REDIS_PASS - _APP_DB_HOST - _APP_DB_PORT - _APP_DB_SCHEMA - _APP_DB_USER - _APP_DB_PASS - _APP_LOGGING_CONFIG container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_appwrite_worker_databases' networks: - internal appwrite-worker-builds: logging: *id001 image: appwrite/appwrite:1.8.0 entrypoint: worker-builds restart: unless-stopped depends_on: - redis - mariadb volumes: - ./appwrite_functions:/storage/functions - redis - mariadb - openruntimes-executor environment: - _APP_ENV - _APP_WORKER_PER_CORE - _APP_OPENSSL_KEY_V1 - _APP_DOMAIN - _APP_OPTIONS_FORCE_HTTPS - _APP_REDIS_HOST - _APP_REDIS_PORT - _APP_REDIS_USER - _APP_SYSTEM_EMAIL_NAME - _APP_SYSTEM_EMAIL_ADDRESS - _APP_DB_HOST - _APP_DB_PORT - _APP_DB_SCHEMA - _APP_DB_USER - _APP_DB_PASS - _APP_REDIS_HOST - _APP_REDIS_PORT - _APP_REDIS_USER - _APP_REDIS_PASS - internal appwrite-worker-messaging: logging: *id001 image: appwrite/appwrite:1.8.0 entrypoint: worker-messaging restart: unless-stopped volumes: - ./appwrite_uploads:/storage/uploads depends_on: - redis environment: - ./appwrite_imports:/storage/imports depends_on: - mariadb environment: - _APP_ENV - _APP_WORKER_PER_CORE - _APP_OPENSSL_KEY_V1 - _APP_DOMAIN - _APP_DOMAIN_TARGET_CNAME - _APP_DOMAIN_TARGET_AAAA - _APP_DOMAIN_TARGET_A - _APP_LOGGING_CONFIG - _APP_MIGRATIONS_FIREBASE_CLIENT_ID - _APP_MIGRATIONS_FIREBASE_CLIENT_SECRET container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_appwrite_worker_migrations' networks: - internal appwrite-task-maintenance: logging: *id001 image: appwrite/appwrite:1.8.0 entrypoint: maintenance restart: unless-stopped depends_on: - redis environment: - _APP_ENV - _APP_WORKER_PER_CORE - _APP_DOMAIN - _APP_DOMAIN_TARGET_CNAME - _APP_DOMAIN_TARGET_AAAA - _APP_DOMAIN_TARGET_A - _APP_DOMAIN_TARGET_CAA - _APP_DNS - _APP_DOMAIN_FUNCTIONS - internal appwrite-task-stats-resources: logging: *id001 image: appwrite/appwrite:1.8.0 entrypoint: stats-resources restart: unless-stopped depends_on: - redis - mariadb environment: - _APP_ENV - _APP_WORKER_PER_CORE - _APP_OPENSSL_KEY_V1 - _APP_DB_HOST - _APP_DB_PORT - _APP_DB_SCHEMA - _APP_DB_USER - _APP_DB_PASS - _APP_REDIS_HOST - _APP_REDIS_PORT - _APP_REDIS_USER - _APP_REDIS_PASS - _APP_USAGE_STATS - _APP_LOGGING_CONFIG - _APP_DATABASE_SHARED_TABLES - _APP_STATS_RESOURCES_INTERVAL container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_appwrite_task_stats_resources' networks: - internal appwrite-worker-stats-resources: logging: *id001 image: appwrite/appwrite:1.8.0 entrypoint: worker-stats-resources restart: unless-stopped depends_on: - redis - mariadb environment: - _APP_ENV - _APP_WORKER_PER_CORE - _APP_OPENSSL_KEY_V1 - _APP_DB_HOST - _APP_DB_PORT - _APP_DB_SCHEMA - _APP_DB_USER - _APP_DB_PASS - _APP_REDIS_HOST - _APP_REDIS_PORT - _APP_REDIS_USER - _APP_REDIS_PASS - _APP_USAGE_STATS - _APP_LOGGING_CONFIG - _APP_STATS_RESOURCES_INTERVAL container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_appwrite_worker_stats_resources' networks: - internal appwrite-worker-stats-usage: logging: *id001 image: appwrite/appwrite:1.8.0 entrypoint: worker-stats-usage restart: unless-stopped depends_on: - redis - mariadb environment: - _APP_ENV - _APP_WORKER_PER_CORE - _APP_OPENSSL_KEY_V1 - _APP_DB_HOST - _APP_DB_PORT - _APP_DB_SCHEMA - _APP_DB_USER - _APP_DB_PASS - _APP_REDIS_HOST - _APP_REDIS_PORT - _APP_REDIS_USER - _APP_REDIS_PASS - _APP_USAGE_STATS - _APP_LOGGING_CONFIG - _APP_USAGE_AGGREGATION_INTERVAL container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_appwrite_worker_stats_usage' networks: - internal appwrite-task-scheduler-functions: logging: *id001 image: appwrite/appwrite:1.8.0 entrypoint: schedule-functions restart: unless-stopped depends_on: - mariadb - redis environment: - _APP_ENV - _APP_WORKER_PER_CORE - _APP_OPENSSL_KEY_V1 - _APP_REDIS_HOST - _APP_REDIS_PORT - _APP_REDIS_USER - _APP_REDIS_PASS - _APP_DB_HOST - _APP_DB_PORT - _APP_DB_SCHEMA - _APP_DB_USER - _APP_DB_PASS container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_appwrite_task_scheduler_functions' networks: - internal appwrite-task-scheduler-executions: logging: *id001 image: appwrite/appwrite:1.8.0 entrypoint: schedule-executions restart: unless-stopped depends_on: - mariadb - redis environment: - _APP_ENV - _APP_WORKER_PER_CORE - _APP_OPENSSL_KEY_V1 - _APP_REDIS_HOST - _APP_REDIS_PORT - _APP_REDIS_USER - _APP_REDIS_PASS - _APP_DB_HOST - _APP_DB_PORT - _APP_DB_SCHEMA - _APP_DB_USER - _APP_DB_PASS container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_appwrite_task_scheduler_executions' networks: - internal appwrite-task-scheduler-messages: logging: *id001 image: appwrite/appwrite:1.8.0 entrypoint: schedule-messages restart: unless-stopped depends_on: - mariadb - redis environment: - _APP_ENV - _APP_WORKER_PER_CORE - _APP_OPENSSL_KEY_V1 - _APP_REDIS_HOST - _APP_REDIS_PORT - _APP_REDIS_USER - _APP_REDIS_PASS - _APP_DB_HOST - _APP_DB_PORT - _APP_DB_SCHEMA - _APP_DB_USER - _APP_DB_PASS container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_appwrite_task_scheduler_messages' networks: - internal appwrite-assistant: logging: *id001 image: appwrite/assistant:0.8.3 restart: unless-stopped environment: - _APP_ASSISTANT_OPENAI_API_KEY container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_appwrite_assistant' networks: - internal appwrite-browser: logging: *id001 image: appwrite/browser:0.2.4 restart: unless-stopped container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_appwrite_browser' networks: - internal openruntimes-executor: logging: *id001 hostname: exc1 restart: unless-stopped stop_signal: SIGINT image: openruntimes/executor:0.7.22 volumes: - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock - ./appwrite_builds:/storage/builds - ./appwrite_functions:/storage/functions - ./appwrite_sites:/storage/sites - /tmp:/tmp:rw environment: - OPR_EXECUTOR_INACTIVE_TRESHOLD=$_APP_COMPUTE_INACTIVE_THRESHOLD - OPR_EXECUTOR_MAINTENANCE_INTERVAL=$_APP_COMPUTE_MAINTENANCE_INTERVAL - OPR_EXECUTOR_NETWORK=$_APP_COMPUTE_RUNTIMES_NETWORK - OPR_EXECUTOR_DOCKER_HUB_USERNAME=$_APP_DOCKER_HUB_USERNAME - OPR_EXECUTOR_DOCKER_HUB_PASSWORD=$_APP_DOCKER_HUB_PASSWORD - OPR_EXECUTOR_ENV=$_APP_ENV - OPR_EXECUTOR_RUNTIMES=$_APP_FUNCTIONS_RUNTIMES,$_APP_SITES_RUNTIMES - OPR_EXECUTOR_SECRET={{ app_executor_secret }} - OPR_EXECUTOR_RUNTIME_VERSIONS=v5 - OPR_EXECUTOR_LOGGING_CONFIG=$_APP_LOGGING_CONFIG - OPR_EXECUTOR_STORAGE_DEVICE=$_APP_STORAGE_DEVICE - OPR_EXECUTOR_STORAGE_S3_ACCESS_KEY=$_APP_STORAGE_S3_ACCESS_KEY - OPR_EXECUTOR_STORAGE_S3_SECRET=$_APP_STORAGE_S3_SECRET - OPR_EXECUTOR_STORAGE_S3_REGION=$_APP_STORAGE_S3_REGION - OPR_EXECUTOR_STORAGE_S3_BUCKET=$_APP_STORAGE_S3_BUCKET - OPR_EXECUTOR_STORAGE_S3_ENDPOINT=$_APP_STORAGE_S3_ENDPOINT - OPR_EXECUTOR_STORAGE_DO_SPACES_ACCESS_KEY=$_APP_STORAGE_DO_SPACES_ACCESS_KEY - OPR_EXECUTOR_STORAGE_DO_SPACES_SECRET=$_APP_STORAGE_DO_SPACES_SECRET - OPR_EXECUTOR_STORAGE_DO_SPACES_REGION=$_APP_STORAGE_DO_SPACES_REGION - OPR_EXECUTOR_STORAGE_DO_SPACES_BUCKET=$_APP_STORAGE_DO_SPACES_BUCKET - OPR_EXECUTOR_STORAGE_BACKBLAZE_ACCESS_KEY=$_APP_STORAGE_BACKBLAZE_ACCESS_KEY - OPR_EXECUTOR_STORAGE_BACKBLAZE_SECRET=$_APP_STORAGE_BACKBLAZE_SECRET - OPR_EXECUTOR_STORAGE_BACKBLAZE_REGION=$_APP_STORAGE_BACKBLAZE_REGION - OPR_EXECUTOR_STORAGE_BACKBLAZE_BUCKET=$_APP_STORAGE_BACKBLAZE_BUCKET - OPR_EXECUTOR_STORAGE_LINODE_ACCESS_KEY=$_APP_STORAGE_LINODE_ACCESS_KEY - OPR_EXECUTOR_STORAGE_LINODE_SECRET=$_APP_STORAGE_LINODE_SECRET - OPR_EXECUTOR_STORAGE_LINODE_REGION=$_APP_STORAGE_LINODE_REGION - OPR_EXECUTOR_STORAGE_LINODE_BUCKET=$_APP_STORAGE_LINODE_BUCKET - OPR_EXECUTOR_STORAGE_WASABI_ACCESS_KEY=$_APP_STORAGE_WASABI_ACCESS_KEY - OPR_EXECUTOR_STORAGE_WASABI_SECRET=$_APP_STORAGE_WASABI_SECRET - OPR_EXECUTOR_STORAGE_WASABI_REGION=$_APP_STORAGE_WASABI_REGION - OPR_EXECUTOR_STORAGE_WASABI_BUCKET=$_APP_STORAGE_WASABI_BUCKET container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_openruntimes_executor' networks: - internal mariadb: logging: *id001 image: mariadb:10.11 restart: unless-stopped volumes: - ./appwrite_mariadb:/var/lib/mysql environment: - MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=${_APP_DB_ROOT_PASS} - MYSQL_DATABASE=${_APP_DB_SCHEMA} - MYSQL_USER=${_APP_DB_USER} - MYSQL_PASSWORD=${_APP_DB_PASS} - MARIADB_AUTO_UPGRADE=1 command: mysqld --innodb-flush-method=fsync container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_mariadb' networks: - internal redis: logging: *id001 image: redis:7.2.4-alpine restart: unless-stopped command: 'redis-server --maxmemory 512mb --maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru --maxmemory-samples 5
' volumes: - ./appwrite_redis:/data container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_redis' networks: - internal networks: internal: driver: bridge agz-proxy-network: external: true

#!/bin/bash set -euo pipefail cd "$SERVICE_PATH" # Dump de la base de APLICACIÓN. Clave: usa MYSQL_PWD (env), NUNCA `-p` — con `-p` y # password vacío (apps con MYSQL_RANDOM_ROOT_PASSWORD) mysql espera un prompt por stdin # y CUELGA. Prefiere el usuario de app (MYSQL_USER/PASSWORD/DATABASE); cae a root solo si # no hay usuario de app (excluye schemas de sistema, que romperían la auth al restaurar). docker compose exec -T mariadb sh -c ' # MariaDB 11+ renombró mysqldump→mariadb-dump y mysql→mariadb: detectamos el binario. DUMP=$(command -v mysqldump || command -v mariadb-dump); CLI=$(command -v mysql || command -v mariadb) if [ -n "${MYSQL_USER:-}" ] && [ -n "${MYSQL_PASSWORD:-}" ] && [ -n "${MYSQL_DATABASE:-}" ]; then export MYSQL_PWD="$MYSQL_PASSWORD" exec "$DUMP" -u"$MYSQL_USER" --single-transaction --databases "$MYSQL_DATABASE" fi export MYSQL_PWD="${MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:-}" DBS=$("$CLI" -uroot -N -e "SHOW DATABASES" | grep -Ev "^(mysql|sys|information_schema|performance_schema)$") [ -z "$DBS" ] && { echo "REVISAR: sin bases de aplicacion para respaldar" >&2; exit 0; } exec "$DUMP" -uroot --single-transaction --databases $DBS ' > "$BACKUP_DATA_DIR/db.sql" echo "mysqldump OK ($(wc -c < "$BACKUP_DATA_DIR/db.sql") bytes)"

#!/bin/bash set -euo pipefail cd "$SERVICE_PATH" docker compose up -d mariadb # Readiness + restore en UN exec (credenciales DENTRO del contenedor, con MYSQL_PWD → # jamás cuelga esperando un prompt de password). Prefiere el usuario de app; cae a root. docker compose exec -T mariadb sh -c ' CLI=$(command -v mysql || command -v mariadb) if [ -n "${MYSQL_USER:-}" ] && [ -n "${MYSQL_PASSWORD:-}" ]; then U="$MYSQL_USER"; export MYSQL_PWD="$MYSQL_PASSWORD"; else U=root; export MYSQL_PWD="${MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:-}"; fi for i in $(seq 1 60); do "$CLI" -u"$U" -e "SELECT 1" >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 2; done exec "$CLI" -u"$U" ' < "$RESTORE_DATA_DIR/db.sql" echo "restore MySQL OK"
